title: Icon
description: A simple mod that allows the Minecraft icon to be changed via resource packs
body:
# Icon

A simple mod that allows the Minecraft icon to be changed via resource packs

*For modpack makers*: you may use this mod in your modpack with or without credit

## Using

Download a resource pack that provides icons, and enable it. Once the resources finish reloading, you should see that the icon in the dock/taskbar has changed.

This mod comes with a default resource pack called Alternate Icons. It's disabled by default, but you can enable it in the resource pack screen.

![an alternate release icon](https://github.com/diacritics-owo/icon/raw/main/src/main/resources/resourcepacks/alternate_icons/assets/icon/icons/icon_256x256.png)
*The release icon from Alternate Icons*

![an alternate release icon](https://github.com/diacritics-owo/icon/raw/main/src/main/resources/resourcepacks/alternate_icons/assets/icon/icons/snapshot/icon_256x256.png)
*The snapshot icon from Alternate Icons*

## Creating Resource Packs

These are the required files:

```
my_resource_pack
|- assets
   |- *namespace*
      |- icons
         |- icon_16x16.png
         |- icon_32x32.png
         |- icon_48x48.png
         |- icon_128x128.png
         |- icon_256x256.png
         |- minecraft.icns
         |- snapshot
            |- icon_16x16.png
            |- icon_32x32.png
            |- icon_48x48.png
            |- icon_128x128.png
            |- icon_256x256.png
            |- minecraft.icns
|- ...
```
